meta.title: DEWEB — Suppliers Compete. Customers Win.
meta.description: Post IT projects, receive competitive bids from verified suppliers, and launch with escrow-backed delivery.

home.title: Suppliers Compete.
home.subtitle: Clients post IT projects and receive multiple competitive offers from verified suppliers. Compare pricing, timelines, and portfolios — then launch with confidence.
home.trusted: Trusted by teams building at scale
home.howTitle: From brief to delivery in three steps
home.howSubtitle: Supplier bidding, transparent pricing, and escrow-backed payments — built for IT procurement at scale.
home.step1Desc: Describe scope, budget, and timeline. DEWEB routes your brief to verified IT suppliers instantly.
home.step2Desc: Multiple suppliers submit offers with pricing, delivery time, and portfolios — you compare side by side.
home.step3Desc: Pick the best fit, pay in DEWEB coins, and track milestones until delivery — with escrow protection.
home.marketTitle: Every IT category. One competitive platform.
home.marketSubtitle: Browse verified suppliers across AI, web, mobile, design, and custom software.
home.activitySubtitle: Watch bids flow in, prices compete down, and deals close — transparency at every step.
home.aiSubtitle: From supplier matching to workflow bots — DEWEB combines marketplace bidding with AI-native delivery.
home.featuredTitle: Top-rated talent competing for your projects
home.pricingTitle: Plans that scale with your ambition
home.ctaFinalSubtitle: Post your project today. Let verified suppliers compete. Choose the best offer and launch with DEWEB escrow.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Premium IT delivery across web, AI, mobile, and growth — with transparent packages and competitive supplier bidding.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Suppliers compete with pricing and timelines. You compare proposals and choose the best fit.

about.title: About DEWEB
about.subtitle: A global IT ecosystem where suppliers compete and customers win — marketplace, agency, and AI automation in one platform.
about.missionText: Make IT procurement transparent, fast, and fair through competitive bidding and verified talent.
about.visionText: Become the default platform for AI-powered IT marketplaces worldwide.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale with priority matching, AI tools, and dedicated support.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Questions about projects, suppliers, or enterprise plans — we're here.
contact.name: Name

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your DEWEB account
auth.signupSubtitle: Join as a customer or supplier
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send reset instructions.
auth.forgotSent: If this email is registered, check your inbox for the reset link.
auth.resetSuccess: Password updated. Redirecting to sign in…
auth.registeredSuccess: Account created. Please sign in with your email and password.

account.overviewSubtitle: Manage projects, wallet, and your profile in one place.
account.profileSubtitle: Complete your account details for trust and faster matching.
account.walletSubtitle: DEWEB coins — 1 DEWEB = 1 USDT = $1. Top up with USDT only.
account.projectsSubtitle: Post projects with your budget. Suppliers compete with proposals.
account.proposalsSubtitle: Browse open customer projects and submit your price.
account.usdtOnly: USDT only via MetaMask or Ronin
account.noProjects: No projects yet. Post your first project.
account.selectProjectBids: Select a project to view supplier proposals.
account.noBidsYet: No proposals yet — suppliers are reviewing your project.
account.selectToBid: Select a project to submit your proposal.
account.postProjectHint: Set budget and receive competing bids
account.topupPending: Submitted for admin verification. DEWEB will be credited after USDT is confirmed.
account.escrowOnAccept: Accepting a proposal locks DEWEB in escrow until the job is completed.
